title: polystichum polyblepharon var. intermedium
intro: Polystichum polyblepharon var. intermedium, also known as the intermediate leathery shield fern, is a variety of the Polystichum polyblepharon plant, which is a type of evergreen fern native to Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Polystichum polyblepharon var. intermedium include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe sore throats, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and infusing its leaves in hot water to make teas or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
